pr.title: Hybrid INL + Sort-Split MoE (1.41/1.46 bpb TTT, 15.5MB, 1xH100)

output.summary: Hybrid GQA and INL layers feed sort-and-split MoE routing with ALiBi slopes to trade off representation building for faster, compact inference under 16MB.
techniques: Hybrid GQA + BetaMu INL blocks for mixing built-in attention with O(n) dynamics
Sort-and-split MoE routing keeps experts fully active in fullgraph-friendly fashion
ALiBi slopes plus int8+zlib compression squeeze the model size
